name: candidate_profile
description: Get a quick profile of a candidate or list all candidates. Use this for simple "who is" or "who's running" questions before doing a full search.

request_body_schema.description: Get a quick profile of a candidate or list all candidates. Use for simple "who is" or "who's running" questions.

candidate.description: The candidate's name or ID to look up. If the user asks "who's running" or "show me all candidates", leave this empty to get the full directory.

angle.description: The specific topic to dig deeper on, e.g., "campaign donors", "voting record on abortion", "Jan 6 involvement", "education policy", "fundraising".
